title: Lyra-2 Inference Pipeline

classes.name: Lyra2InferencePipeline
classes.description: Stateful pipeline for Lyra2 autoregressive inference. Owns VAE caches and Sparse3DCache.
methods: __init__(*, model, args, first_frame, first_depth, first_cam_w2c, first_intrinsics, da3_model, cp_group, base_t5_text_embeddings, base_neg_t5_text_embeddings, padding_mask, fps, vipe_input_dump_dir, vipe_input_dump_prefix, multiview_data)

classes.name: VIPEWrapper
classes.description: Dynamically-defined wrapper around the VIPE pose-estimation pipeline. Created inside _import_vipe_class().
methods: __init__(overrides: Sequence[str], *, config_dir, config_name, device, fast_mode: bool)
infer_frames(frames: Tensor, *, fps: float, name: str) -> VIPEOutputs

classes.name: VIPEOutputs
classes.description: Dataclass (slots=True) holding pose+depth output from VIPEWrapper.

classes.name: InMemoryVideoStream
classes.description: Concrete VideoStream backed by a pre-loaded RGB tensor; dynamically defined inside _import_vipe_class().

classes.name: HuggingfaceTokenizer
classes.description: Wraps HuggingFace AutoTokenizer; used by UMT5EncoderModel to tokenize text prompts. Duplicated in modules/umt5.py.

classes.name: UMT5EncoderModel
classes.description: Loads and wraps the UMT5-XXL encoder (encoder-only T5). Used to produce T5 text embeddings (512×4096) for Lyra2.
methods: __init__(text_len, dtype, device, checkpoint_path, tokenizer_path, enable_fsdp_shard, load_on_cpu)

classes.name: VideoTokenizerInterface
classes.description: Abstract base class (ABC) defining the encode/decode interface for video tokenizers.

classes.name: Wan2pt1VAEInterface
classes.description: Concrete VideoTokenizerInterface wrapping WanVAE. Used as model.tokenizer inside Lyra2Model.
methods: encode(state: Tensor) -> Tensor  # normalizes with img/video mean+std

classes.name: WanVAE
classes.description: Non-nn.Module wrapper holding WanVAE_ and mean/std tensors. Handles AMP context.
methods: __init__(z_dim, vae_pth, load_mean_std, dtype, device, is_amp, temporal_window)

classes.name: WanVAE_
classes.description: Core 3D-causal VAE nn.Module with temporal-windowed streaming encode/decode and internal feature caches.
methods: __init__(dim, z_dim, dim_mult, num_res_blocks, attn_scales, temperal_downsample, dropout, temporal_window)

classes.name: Encoder3d
classes.description: 3D encoder with CausalConv3d, ResidualBlock, AttentionBlock, Resample layers.

classes.name: Decoder3d
classes.description: 3D decoder mirror of Encoder3d; supports streaming decode via feat_cache.

classes.name: BaseVAE
classes.description: Abstract base class for VAEs. Extends nn.Module and ABC.

classes.name: BasePretrainedImageVAE
classes.description: Extends BaseVAE; loads mean/std from remote store; provides encode/decode with normalization.

classes.name: JITVAE
classes.description: Loads JIT-compiled encoder/decoder from remote store.
methods: __init__(enc_fp, dec_fp, name, mean_std_fp, latent_ch, is_image, is_bf16, load_mean_std)

classes.name: StateDictVAE
classes.description: Loads encoder/decoder weights from JIT state_dict into a provided nn.Module.
methods: __init__(enc_fp, dec_fp, vae, name, mean_std_fp, latent_ch, is_image, is_bf16)

classes.name: SDVAE
classes.description: Stable Diffusion VAE wrapper backed by diffusers AutoencoderKL; optional 2× downsample.

classes.name: Sparse3DCache
classes.description: Sparse 3D point-cloud cache mapping latent frames to unprojected world points; used for spatial overlap retrieval during AR generation.
methods: add(depth_B_1_H_W, w2c_B_4_4, K_B_3_3, latent_index, frame_id) -> None

classes.name: Lyra2Model
classes.description: Main Lyra-2 diffusion model (FramePack spatial). Extends WANDiffusionModel. Holds the net (transformer) and tokenizer.

classes.name: T5Encoder
classes.description: Transformer encoder (UMT5 architecture). Used in encoder-only mode for text embeddings.

classes.name: CausalConv3d
classes.description: 3D convolution with causal padding; accepts feat_cache for streaming inference.

classes.name: AttentionBlock
classes.description: Single-head causal spatial self-attention.

classes.name: Resample
classes.description: Handles up/downsample in 2D or 3D; uses CausalConv3d for temporal operations.

relationships: Encoder3d contains CausalConv3d, ResidualBlock, AttentionBlock, Resample
Decoder3d contains CausalConv3d, ResidualBlock, AttentionBlock, Resample
key_design_patterns: Factory: _import_vipe_class() dynamically creates VIPEWrapper and InMemoryVideoStream classes at runtime (defers vipe import)
Template Method: VideoTokenizerInterface defines abstract encode/decode contract; Wan2pt1VAEInterface and BasePretrainedImageVAE fill in implementations
Streaming / Cache Pattern: WanVAE_ + CausalConv3d use feat_cache lists to enable frame-by-frame streaming decode without re-processing history
Facade: Lyra2InferencePipeline hides the complexity of AR steps, cache priming, depth prediction, and VAE streaming behind a simple autoregressive_step() API
Singleton: t5_encoder (module-level global) in get_t5_emb.py is lazily initialized and reused across calls to get_umt5_embedding()
important_notes: VIPEWrapper and InMemoryVideoStream are NOT top-level classes — they are created inside _import_vipe_class() to defer the 'vipe' import until needed
Wan2pt1VAEInterface is referenced as model.tokenizer; _get_vae_handles() peels off vae_iface → vae_wrap (WanVAE) → vae_core (WanVAE_)
Sparse3DCache is in lyra2_model.py (not inference/), imported by lyra2_ar_inference.py
HuggingfaceTokenizer appears in both get_t5_emb.py and modules/umt5.py (near-identical duplicate)
BaseVAE hierarchy (JITVAE, StateDictVAE, SDVAE) is in tokenizers/base_vae.py but NOT directly used by Lyra2 inference — Wan2pt1VAEInterface is the active tokenizer
Lyra2Model.config is Lyra2T2VConfig (a dataclass); key fields include use_mp_policy_fsdp, keep_original_net_dtype, framepack_type
AR inference scripts (lyra2_ar_inference, lyra2_custom_traj_inference, lyra2_zoomgs_inference) are entry-point scripts, not importable library classes
Depth estimation uses DA3 (Depth Anything 3) model; optionally MoGe for depth scale alignment
T5 text embeddings are padded to shape (1, 512, 4096) before passing to the model
